string.text: Laser Sight Kit
.A kit containing a laser sight for the weapon it is intended for. \n \n
Colt M1911A1 .45 ACP

Commonly known as just "1911", the M1911 is one of the most famous handguns on the planet. It went through both World Wars as the US Army's standard-issue, and despite being replaced in 1986, its further variations are still being used as the sidearm of different US Special Forces. The M1911A1 is the second generation of the original M1911 pistol. After World War I, the military's Model 1911 went through various changes including a shorter trigger with frame cuts, improved iron sights, an arched mainspring housing, and a redesigned grip safety.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Jarvis .45 ACP threaded barrel.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SilencerCo Omega 45k Piston Mount adapter.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SilencerCo Omega 45k .45 ACP sound suppressor.
Colt M1911A1 "Anarchy"

Commonly known as just "1911", the M1911 is one of the most famous handguns on the planet. It went through both World Wars as the US Army's standard-issue, and despite being replaced in 1986, its further variations are still being used as the sidearm of different US Special Forces. The M1911A1 is the second generation of the original M1911 pistol. After World War I, the military's Model 1911 went through various changes including a shorter trigger with frame cuts, improved iron sights, an arched mainspring housing, and a redesigned grip safety. A custom version of the gun with lots of tuning and improvements one of which is a fully automatic firing mode. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] FULL AUTO Firing mode.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] M1911 Anarchy Outdoors .45 ACP muzzle brake.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] NcSTAR trigger guard mount.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SureFire X400 Ultra tactical flashlight with laser.
Colt M45A1 .45 ACP

The MEU(SOC) pistol, ("Marine Expeditionary Unit"; "Special Operations Capable") officially designated the M45 MEUSOC, is a magazine-fed, recoil-operated, single-action, semiautomatic pistol chambered for the .45 ACP cartridge. It's a variant of the M1911, and has been the standard-issue side arm for the Force Recon Element of the United States Marine Corps' Marine Expeditionary Units since 1985.
 The improved 1911_nsc features several changes to the original M1911A1 design. One feature is the dual recoil spring system that spreads out the recoil force of the .45 ACP round by lowering the peak force of the recoil pulse. It also has 3-dot tritium night sights, a 5-inch national match barrel, ambidextrous safety, a picatinny rail, and a desert tan Cerakote finish. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Jarvis .45 ACP threaded barrel.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SilencerCo Omega 45k Piston Mount adapter.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SilencerCo Omega 45k .45 ACP sound suppressor.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SureFire X400 Ultra tactical flashlight with laser.
Colt 1911 Nightsword Custom (NSC)

Colt 1911 Nightsword Custom (NSC) Pistol — a rare and valuable piece of high-tech weaponry, featuring an improved feed system and exceptional accuracy. This unique model is ideal for experienced stalkers seeking maximum combat efficiency. Customized sights allow for precise aiming even in low light or poor visibility conditions. The weapon is equipped with a 3 round burst mode, significantly increasing firepower. With an extended magazine capacity of 15 rounds, the pistol provides sustained fire without frequent reloading. This pistol is a reliable and powerful weapon suitable for any dangerous situation within the Zone. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Jarvis .45 ACP threaded barrel.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SilencerCo Osprey sound suppressor.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SureFire X400 Ultra tactical flashlight with laser.
L.A.R. Grizzly Win Mag .357

L.A.R. Grizzly Win Mag (Mark I) — a powerful and reliable semi-automatic pistol developed in the USA. Features a reinforced metal body and uses .357 Magnum cartridges. Equipped with a detachable 7-round magazine. Thanks to its power and accuracy, it is excellent for effectively dealing with mutants and enemies in hazardous zones. Durable, easy to maintain, and capable of becoming an indispensable weapon in the Zone. \n \n
Kimber Rapide .45 ACP

Kimber Rapide is a high-quality semi-automatic pistol based on the classic 1911 model. It features a modern design, improved ergonomics, and high shooting accuracy. Equipped with a steel frame, rifled barrel, and a recoil system that ensures smooth and reliable operation. The firearm is chambered in .45 ACP and comes with a 8 round detachable magazine. This version of the pistol is well-suited for fighting mutants and lightly armored stalkers. It is rarely encountered in the Zone, making it a valuable weapon. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Особенности: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SilencerCo Osprey sound supressor. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SureFire X400 Ultra tactical flashlight with laser.

A legendary pistol that has seen numerous military conflicts throughout the years and is still in service in certain regions of the world, in one variation or another. This one is a classic TT-33, the most mass-produced version. It features a Browning short-recoil tilting-barrel system, but other than that, the construction design is very unique - it is purposefully simple, single-action, and no safety measures except half-cock notch, which makes it be able to withstand horrible operating abuse. Thanks to the powerful 7.62x25 cartridge and relatively long barrel, the TT boasts high muzzle velocity, penetration, and impressive accuracy, even over long distances. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Особенности: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Custom sound supressor for 7.62x25 TT.

A legendary pistol that has seen numerous military conflicts throughout the years and is still in service in certain regions of the world, in one variation or another. This one is a classic TT-33, the most mass-produced version. It features a Browning short-recoil tilting-barrel system, but other than that, the construction design is very unique - it is purposefully simple, single-action, and no safety measures except half-cock notch, which makes it be able to withstand horrible operating abuse. Thanks to the powerful 7.62x25 cartridge and relatively long barrel, the TT boasts high muzzle velocity, penetration, and impressive accuracy, even over long distances. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Особенности: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Zarya laser sight. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Custom sound supressor for 7.62x25 TT.
Mangun's ТТ-33 7.62x25 ТТ

A legendary pistol that has seen numerous military conflicts throughout the years and is still in service in certain regions of the world, in one variation or another. This one is a classic TT-33, the most mass-produced version. It features a Browning short-recoil tilting-barrel system, but other than that, the construction design is very unique - it is purposefully simple, single-action, and no safety measures except half-cock notch, which makes it be able to withstand horrible operating abuse. Thanks to the powerful 7.62x25 cartridge and relatively long barrel, the TT boasts high muzzle velocity, penetration, and impressive accuracy, even over long distances. A custom version of the TT-33 pistol manufactured by the technician of the Duty faction, Sergeant Gromov (aka Mangun). It features several upgrades, including an increased rate of fire, a custom threaded barrel for suppressor attachment, and improved ergonomics. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Особенности: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Custom sound supressor for 7.62x25 TT . 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Custom wooden pistol grip with laser sight. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Extended magazine (13 rounds). 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Extended iron sights with tritium sights.
Tactical upgrade kit for the ТТ-33

Tactical upgrade kit for the ТТ-33 7.62x25 ТТ. Includes modifications with extended barrel, Extended iron sights with tritium sights, new magazine (13 rounds) and Custom wooden pistol grip with laser sight. 
 

%c[ui_gray_2]Особенности: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Custom sound supressor for 7.62x25 TT . 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Custom wooden pistol grip with laser sight. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Extended magazine (13 rounds). 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Extended barrel. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Extended iron sights with tritium sights.
Makarov PM Pistol 9x18

The time-proven PM pistol (Pistolet Makarova - "Makarov Pistol", GAU Index - 56-A-125). Due to its widespread affordability and availability of both the pistol and ammunition, along with its exceptional reliability, light weight, and compactness, it is often used by stalkers in the Zone's southern territories. The only drawback is the low stopping power of the pistol. This model is equipped with an extended barrel with a thread for attaching a suppressor. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Extended barrel with a thread for attaching a suppressor. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Modified suppressor for PM.
Makarov PM Pistol 9x18

The time-proven PM pistol (Pistolet Makarova - "Makarov Pistol", GAU Index - 56-A-125). Due to its widespread affordability and availability of both the pistol and ammunition, along with its exceptional reliability, light weight, and compactness, it is frequently used by stalkers in the Zone's southern territories. The only drawback is the low stopping power of the pistol. This model is equipped with an extended barrel with a thread for attaching a suppressor. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Extended barrel with a thread for attaching a suppressor. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Modified suppressor for PM. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Zarya pistol grip with laser sight.
Upgraded Makarov PM Pistol 9x18

The time-proven PM pistol (Pistolet Makarova - "Makarov Pistol", GAU Index - 56-A-125). Due to its widespread affordability and availability of both the pistol and ammunition, along with its exceptional reliability, light weight, and compactness, it is often used by stalkers in the Zone's southern territories. The only drawback is the low stopping power of the pistol. This model is equipped with an extended barrel with a thread for attaching a suppressor. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Extended barrel with a thread for attaching a suppressor. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Zarya Z-1x20 mini RDS. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Olive Zarya pistol grip. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Extended magazine (10 rounds).
Upgrade Kit for the Makarov PM pistol

Tactical upgrade kit for the Makarov PM pistol 9x18. Includes modifications to improve ergonomics and Zarya Z-1x20 mini RDS. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Zarya Z-1x20 mini RDS. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Olive Zarya pistol grip. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Extended magazine (10 rounds).
Silenced Pistol PB 9x18

The PB silenced pistol (Pistolet Besshumnyy - "Silenced Pistol", GRAU Index 6П9) was designed with a two-part suppressor, the main suppressor and a section built into the barrel, which allows the weapon to be operated without problems even without the main suppressor attached, but operating the weapon this way will not mitigate the sound or muzzle flash. It was intended for army reconnaissance groups and USSR KGB personnel and introduced into service in 1967. It remains in service with FSB special units and the Internal Troops of the Ministry of Internal Affairs of Russia. Not as popular as the Makarov pistol, but still often used by stalkers, as it shares the same advantages as the PM. \n \n
Upgraded PB 9x18 Silenced Pistol

The PB silenced pistol (Pistolet Besshumnyy - "Silenced Pistol", GRAU Index 6П9) was designed with a two-part suppressor, the main suppressor and a section built into the barrel, which allows the weapon to be operated without problems even without the main suppressor attached, but operating the weapon this way will not mitigate the sound or muzzle flash. It was intended for army reconnaissance groups and USSR KGB personnel and introduced into service in 1967. It remains in service with FSB special units and the Internal Troops of the Ministry of Internal Affairs of Russia. Not as popular as the Makarov pistol, but still often used by stalkers, as it shares the same advantages as the PM. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Laser sight with custom mount. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Zarya Z-1x20 mini RDS. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Extended magazine (10 rounds).
Upgrade Kit for the PB 9x18 Silenced Pistol

Tactical upgrade kit for the Silenced PB 9x18 pistol. Includes upgrades for improved ergonomics, built-in laser, Picatinny rail, and Aimpoint Micro T1 collimator sight. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Laser sight with custom mount. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Zarya Z-1x20 mini RDS. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Extended magazine (10 rounds).
OTs-33 "Pernach"

Developed to replace the Stechkin APS pistol in special military units, the OTs-33 "Pernach" is a pistol capable of both automatic and semi-automatic fire. "Pernach" was specifically designed to address the recoil control issues in automatic mode inherent to the Stechkin APS, as well as to simplify its use in combat conditions. It is cheaper to produce, more comfortable to handle, and features improved recoil management. This model is a modernized version commissioned by military stalkers in the Zone. \n \n
OTs-33 "Pernach"

Developed to replace the Stechkin APS pistol in special military units, the OTs-33 "Pernach" is a pistol capable of both automatic and semi-automatic fire. "Pernach" was specifically designed to address the recoil control issues in automatic mode inherent to the Stechkin APS, as well as to simplify its use in combat conditions. It is cheaper to produce, more comfortable to handle, and features improved recoil management. This model is a modernized version commissioned by military stalkers in the Zone. 
 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Custom Picatinny rail. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] NcSTAR "Tactical Red Laser".
HK USP Tactical .45 ACP

The HK USP (Universelle Selbstladepistole - "Universal Self-loading Pistol") pistol is a further replacement of the HK P7 series pistols manufactured by Heckler and Koch. Internationally accepted as an accurate and ultra-reliable handgun. Using a modified Browning-type action with a special patented recoil reduction system, the USP recoil reduction system reduces recoil effects on pistol components and also lowers the recoil forces felt by the shooter. This particular variant is chambered in .45 ACP and equipped with a detachable 12-round magazine. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] HK USP Tactical .45 ACP pistol slide. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] HK USP rail adapter. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SilencerCo Osprey sound supressor. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SureFire X400 Ultra tactical flashlight with laser.
RSh-12 Shorty 12.7x55mm

The powerful RSh-12 (Revolver Shturmovoy 12 - "Assault Revolver 12") revolver, manufactured by KBP Instrument Design Bureau, designed for use by special forces. Despite the powerful 12.7x55 mm caliber. This is a shortened, more compact version of the revolver, having less weight, but as a result of which the recoil is increased. This modification also has an threated barrel for installing a 12.7mm tactical silencer. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] 12.7mm Tactical Silencer.
Beretta M9A3 Tactical upgrade kit

Tactical upgrade kit for the Beretta M9A3 pistol. Includes SureFire XC1 tactical flashlight with laser laser, Tactical mount rail and Deltapoint collimator sight. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Tactical mount rail. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Detlapoint RDS 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SureFire XC1 tactical flashlight with laser. %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Thermal dust cover for supressor.
Beretta M9A3

The Beretta M9A3 is a modern semi-automatic pistol developed by the Italian company Beretta. It is based on the popular M9 model, but with a number of improvements. Features include improved Ergonomics with new grip, increased 17 round magazine, improved safety system. The pistol is suitable for military and law enforcement due to its reliability and accuracy. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] M9A3 9x19 127mm threaded barrel. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] AAC Illusion 9 9x19 sound suppressor. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SureFire X400 Ultra tactical flashlight with laser.
Lebedev PL-15 9x19 pistol

A Russian self-loading pistol chambered in 9x19mm, developed by a team of designers from the Kalashnikov concern under the leadership of Dmitry Lebedev for the needs of Russian law enforcement agencies. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] PL-15 9x19 112mm threaded barrel. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Hexagon modular SP-9 sound suppressor.
Lebedev PL-15 9x19 pistol

A Russian self-loading pistol chambered in 9x19mm, developed by a team of designers from the Kalashnikov concern under the leadership of Dmitry Lebedev for the needs of Russian law enforcement agencies. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] PL-15 9x19 112mm threaded barrel. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Hexagon modular SP-9 sound suppressor. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SureFire X400 Ultra tactical flashlight with laser.
Upgraded Lebedev PL-15 9x19 pistol

A Russian self-loading pistol chambered in 9x19mm, developed by a team of designers from the Kalashnikov concern under the leadership of Dmitry Lebedev for the needs of Russian law enforcement agencies. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] PL-15 9x19 112mm threaded barrel. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Hexagon modular SP-9 sound suppressor. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Zarya Z-1x20 mini RDS. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Thermal wrap for supressor. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SureFire X400 Ultra tactical flashlight with laser.
Ugrade kit for Lebedev PL-15 9x19 pistol

Tactical upgrade kit for the Lebedev PL-15 9x19 pistol. Includes SureFire X400 Ultra tactical flashlight with laser, Zarya Z-1x20 mini RDS and Thermal wrap for supressor. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] PL-15 9x19 112mm threaded barrel. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Hexagon modular SP-9 sound suppressor. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Zarya Z-1x20 mini RDS. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Thermal wrap for supressor. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SureFire X400 Ultra tactical flashlight with laser.
Serdyukov SR-1MP Gyurza 9x21 pistol

The SR-1MP pistol (GRAU index - 6P53), also known as "Gyurza" (Viper) or SPS ("Samozaryadnyy Pistolyet Serdyukova" - Serdyukov Semiautomatic Pistol), was designed by P. Serdyukov and I. Belyaev with the powerful 9x21 cartridge to replace the APS machine pistol used by the special forces of the Russian Federation. This model can be fitted with a set of mounts to attach additional equipment, as well as work as a base for installing a suppressor. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Possibility of installing factory mounts for laser and red dot sights.
Serdyukov SR-1MP Gyurza 9x21 pistol

The SR-1MP pistol (GRAU index - 6P53), also known as "Gyurza" (Viper) or SPS ("Samozaryadnyy Pistolyet Serdyukova" - Serdyukov Semiautomatic Pistol), was designed by P. Serdyukov and I. Belyaev with the powerful 9x21 cartridge to replace the APS machine pistol used by the special forces of the Russian Federation. This model can be fitted with a set of mounts to attach additional equipment, as well as work as a base for installing a suppressor. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SR-1MP single rail mount. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SR-1MP 9x21 sound suppressor with mount. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Zarya laser sight.
Upgraded SR-1MP Gyurza 9x21 pistol

The SR-1MP pistol (GRAU index - 6P53), also known as "Gyurza" (Viper) or SPS ("Samozaryadnyy Pistolyet Serdyukova" - Serdyukov Semiautomatic Pistol), was designed by P. Serdyukov and I. Belyaev with the powerful 9x21 cartridge to replace the APS machine pistol used by the special forces of the Russian Federation. This model can be fitted with a set of mounts to attach additional equipment, as well as work as a base for installing a suppressor. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SR-1MP single rail mount. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SR-1MP 9x21 sound suppressor with mount. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Zarya Z-1x20 mini RDS. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Thermal wrap for supressor. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Zarya laser sight.
Upgrade kit for SR-1MP Gyurza 9x21 pistol

Tactical upgrade kit for the SR-1MP Gyurza 9x21 pistol. Includes SR-1MP 9x21 sound suppressor with mount, Single rail mount and Zarya laser sight. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SR-1MP single rail mount. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SR-1MP 9x21 sound suppressor with mount. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Zarya laser sight.
Advanced upgrade kit for SR-1MP Gyurza 9x21 pistol

Tactical upgrade kit for the SR-1MP Gyurza 9x21 pistol. Includes SR-1MP 9x21 sound suppressor with mount, Single rail mount, Thermal wrap for supressor, Zarya Z-1x20 mini RDS and laser sight. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SR-1MP single rail mount. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] SR-1MP 9x21 sound suppressor with mount. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Zarya Z-1x20 mini RDS. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Thermal wrap for supressor. 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Zarya laser sight.
